title: Nebraska Wage, Overtime and Meal-Break Law 2026 | Teamed
description: Nebraska wage law 2026: $15.00/hr minimum (Initiative 433), FLSA 40-hr overtime, $7.50 tipped cash wage, no adult meal-break mandate. CPI-indexed from 2027.
h1: How does Nebraska wage, overtime and meal-break law work in 2026?
target_keywords: nebraska wage overtime meal break law 2026

key_facts.minimum_wage_legislation: Initiative 433 (Raise the Wage Act, November 2022 ballot)
key_facts.minimum_wage_2027: CPI-adjusted (to be announced NE DOL autumn 2026)
key_facts.final_pay_deadline: Next regular payday or within 2 weeks, whichever sooner
key_facts.paid_sick_leave_legislation: Initiative 436 / Nebraska Healthy Families and Workplaces Act (amended LB 415)
key_facts.governing_overtime_law: Federal FLSA (no separate Nebraska overtime statute)
